mapper.select: select t.*,(select count(0) from JKERP.test_instrument i where t.id=i.laboratory_id and i.del_flag=0 ) as quantity from JKERP.test_laboratory t ${ew.customSqlsegment}
mapper.insert:
insert into JKERP.test_laboratory(name, code, administintor, position, phone, picture, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.administintor}, #{entity.position}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.picture}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into JKERP.test_laboratory(name, code, administintor, position, phone, picture, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.name}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.administintor}, #{entity.position}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.picture}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update name = values(name) , code = values(code) , administintor = values(administintor) , position = values(position) , phone = values(phone) , picture = values(picture) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
